silver_tables.name: silver_signinlogs_distinctips_15m
silver_tables.purpose: 15-minute and hourly aggregates of distinct IP sign-ins per user for trend and threshold calculations

silver_tables.name: silver_officeactivity_downloads_hourly
silver_tables.purpose: Hourly download counts and distinct file counts per user to support exfiltration detection

silver_tables.name: silver_azure_diagsettings_changes_hourly
silver_tables.purpose: Hourly aggregates of diagnostic/settings modification events, callers and resources for detection and MTTR analysis

silver_tables.name: silver_wiz_findings_nonprod_daily
silver_tables.purpose: Daily aggregates of high/critical Wiz findings for non-production internet-exposed assets

silver_table_suggestion.name: silver_signinlogs_distinctips_15m
calculation_steps: Aggregate SigninLogs into 15-minute bins by UserPrincipalName and count distinct IPAddress.
Summarize counts to hourly grain and compute flagged bins where distinctIPs >= 3.
Produce daily rollups and compute 7-day rolling averages for trend analysis.

silver_table_suggestion.name: silver_officeactivity_downloads_hourly
calculation_steps: Filter OfficeActivity to file download/access operations and bin by UserId hourly.
Count downloads and distinct files per user per hour and flag thresholds.
Roll hourly aggregates into daily summaries for KPIs and trends.

silver_table_suggestion.name: silver_azure_diagsettings_changes_hourly
calculation_steps: Filter AzureActivity to diagnosticSettings operations and success events.
Aggregate events to hourly bins, count events by resource and caller, and apply suppression lists.
Create daily rollups for MTTR and unique caller KPIs.

silver_table_suggestion.name: silver_wiz_findings_nonprod_daily
calculation_steps: Filter WizFindings_CL to High/Critical severity and non-production internet-exposed resources.
Aggregate to daily counts per resource and deduplicate findings tied to the same vulnerability instance.
Compute 7-day rolling averages and identify persistent findings for prioritization.
